description_long: This is a small, classic-style sailing yacht with a single mast and a fore-and-aft rigged sail. The hull is sleek and narrow, painted white with a brown trim along the gunwale and deck edges. The deck is open with a recessed cockpit area, featuring wooden seating and a tiller for steering. The mast is tall and centrally positioned, with rigging lines visible and a large, cream-colored sail unfurled. The bow is pointed and the stern is slightly rounded, with a visible rudder beneath the waterline. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for leisure sailing in calm waters.
description: A small, elegant sailing yacht with a white hull, brown trim, and a single tall mast with a cream sail. Features an open deck with a recessed cockpit and classic nautical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, the tall mast, and the large cream sail, with the open cockpit and tiller visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, narrow hull, and the mast rising vertically from the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the sail, mast, and open cockpit from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded stern, open cockpit, and the tiller extending from the back.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pointed bow and rounded stern, white hull with brown trim, visible keel and rudder beneath the waterline, no visible chines or additional hull markings.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with a recessed cockpit amidships, wooden seating along the cockpit sides, tiller at the stern, and no visible railings or additional deck equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No visible cabin structure; the deck is open with no raised superstructure, windows, or doors apparent.
